commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6f4d61da72ccdac1e6ad1fa4e5fa9f691780127e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes configured remote and explicit gateway probe targets use the caller timeout budget and adds helper and command regression tests.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +19. Total +22 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current main and v2026.5.27 source still cap non-loopback configured remote probes at 1500ms while the linked report gives concrete remote-mode steps with a larger timeout; I did not run a live remote gateway in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs a narrow contributor or maintainer revision plus external real-environment proof, so it should stay in human PR review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(gateway): honor configured remote probe budgets
target.body:
## Summary
- honor the caller timeout budget for configured remote and explicit remote gateway probes
- keep the shorter ssh tunnel cap unchanged
- cover both the helper budget split and the `gateway probe` command path with regression tests

Fixes #65355.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `openclaw gateway probe --timeout <n>` still capped `configRemote` probes at `1500ms`, so a healthy remote gateway could false-negative even when the caller supplied a larger budget.

**Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node.js v22.22.0, HEAD `6f4d61da72ccdac1e6ad1fa4e5fa9f691780127e` based on `origin/main` `6399b6a4455d0a5373329dc8c71ff4b1da6f50c9`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
  --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts \
  src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts --reporter=verbose --testTimeout=30000

OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
  --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts \
  src/commands/gateway-status/helpers.test.ts --reporter=verbose --testTimeout=10000
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```
$ OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
  --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts \
  src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts --reporter=verbose --testTimeout=30000

 RUN  v4.1.7 /media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw-issue-65355-fresh

 ✓ |commands| src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts > gateway-status command > prints human output by default 93ms
 ✓ |commands| src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts > gateway-status command > passes the full caller timeout through to local loopback probes 1ms
 ✓ |commands| src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts > gateway-status command > passes the full caller timeout through to configured remote probes 1ms
 ✓ |commands| src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts > gateway-status command > uses configured handshake timeout as the default local probe budget 1ms
 ✓ |commands| src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts > gateway-status command > keeps inactive local loopback probes on the short timeout in remote mode 1ms
[... 20 more passing tests ...]

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)
   Start at  03:17:42
   Duration  2.11s (transform 841ms, setup 348ms, import 1.38s, tests 146ms, environment 0ms)
```

The tests `passes the full caller timeout through to configured remote probes` and `keeps inactive local loopback probes on the short timeout in remote mode` directly verify the budget routing fix: configured-remote probes now receive the full caller budget, while SSH tunnel and inactive local probes remain capped.

**Observed result after fix:** `gateway probe --timeout 15000` now passes the full `15000ms` budget to `configRemote` and `explicit` probe targets. SSH tunnel probes are still capped at `2000ms`.

**What was not tested:** End-to-end `gateway probe` against a live remote gateway. The budget routing is covered by unit tests for both the helper and the command path.
